corrections.note: Suspected typo in the R3 relation at m == 1 mod 3 was flagged during layer 3; turned out MOOT for the d=10 chain (G13 needs no bridge relation). Bridges are only needed at moduli == -1 mod 3 (scaling-law remark, prove-seed1-layer4.tex).
